description: Get a quick overview of the connected Fivetran account
name: base

fivetran_allow_writes.description: Allow the Fivetran MCP server to perform write operations
fivetran_allow_writes.title: Enable Fivetran writes

fivetran_api_secret.description: API secret paired with the configured Fivetran API key
fivetran_api_secret.title: Fivetran API secret
